title: SOCIAL SERVICES - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD SOCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides personal care supplies such as toothpaste and brushes, shampoo and conditioner, feminine products, deodorant, soap, and bus transportation passes. Helps with obtaining an Oregon ID or driver's license and is once per lifetime. All services are based on funding and current availability. 2424 N Pacific Highway Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 11am-1pm Email (541) 772-3828 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 772-3828 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more infomation FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Services: Personal/Grooming Supplies Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance Transportation Passes Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - DINING ROOM FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - ST ANTHONY EMERGENCY FAMILY SHELTER MATERIAL GOODS - THRIFT STORE MATERIAL GOODS - URBAN REST STOP UTILITIES - UTILITY AND RENT ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD
